noc_server._comment: Set host to EC2 public IP or domain for production. localhost = test against local noc_backend

_comment_charger_ip: IP address of the QFlex charger whose APIs to collect from.
'localhost'      → NocEngine is running ON the charger itself (production)
'172.16.14.123'  → NocEngine is running on your Windows PC, charger is at that static IP (testing)
This single field controls ALL three service URLs (ports 8003, 8002, 8006).

charger_ports._comment: Change only if charger services run on non-standard ports

telemetry._comment: How often to push charger status to NOC server (seconds)

reconnect._comment: Exponential backoff caps at this value: 5s→10s→20s→40s→60s
